prompt: A highly polished studio photograph of a chameleon entirely covered in tiny mirrored disco-ball tiles, perched on top of a large mirrored disco ball sphere. Side profile facing right, with a curled tail, four visible legs gripping the sphere, a prominent casque-like head crest, round glossy black eye, and a delicate row of small scales along the jawline. The mosaic tiles should reflect silver, pale blue, and cool white highlights, creating sparkling specular reflections across both the animal and the sphere. Use a soft glamorous disco atmosphere with a smooth teal-blue gradient background, shallow depth of field, and scattered circular bokeh lights in the background. Soft diffused lighting with bright glints on the mirrored surfaces, ultra-detailed texture, photorealistic materials, centered composition, elegant and whimsical luxury aesthetic.
